name: Community Release
description: Release review templates, routing hints, scoring rules, and an external webhook channel.
author: community

request_templates.title: Ship {{version}}
request_templates.description: Ask a human to decide whether a release can ship.
request_templates.prompt_template: Review {{project}} {{version}} and decide whether it can ship.

route_strategies.title: Trusted online reviewers
route_strategies.description: Prefer online humans with release experience.

scoring_rules.title: Release risk rubric
scoring_rules.description: Score the answer against test, rollback, and user-impact evidence.

channels.title: Review webhook
channels.description: Forward selected review tasks to an external community channel.
